title: aster umbellatus var. humilis
intro: Aster umbellatus var. humilis, also known as the small-flowered American aster, is a perennial plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to eastern North America. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Aster umbellatus var. humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
